tools.name: discovery.find
tools.description: Find attractions (artists, sports, packages, plays and so on) and filter your search by name, and much more.

tools.name: discovery.get
tools.description: Get details for a specific attraction using the unique identifier for the attraction.

tools.name: discovery.getDiscoveryV2Classifications
tools.description: Find classifications and filter your search by name, and much more. Classifications help define the nature of attractions and events.

tools.name: discovery.getDiscoveryV2ClassificationsId
tools.description: Get details for a specific segment, genre, or sub-genre using its unique identifier.

tools.name: discovery.getDiscoveryV2Events
tools.description: Find events and filter your search by location, date, availability, and much more.

tools.name: discovery.getDiscoveryV2EventsId
tools.description: Get details for a specific event using the unique identifier for the event. This includes the venue and location, the attraction(s), and the Ticketmaster Website URL for purchasing tickets for the event.

tools.name: discovery.getDiscoveryV2Venues
tools.description: Find venues and filter your search by name, and much more.

tools.name: discovery.getDiscoveryV2VenuesId
tools.description: Get details for a specific venue using the unique identifier for the venue.

tools.name: discovery.getGenre
tools.description: Get details for a specific genre using its unique identifier.

tools.name: discovery.getImages
tools.description: Get images for a specific event using the unique identifier for the event.

tools.name: discovery.getSegment
tools.description: Get details for a specific segment using its unique identifier.

tools.name: discovery.getSubgenre
tools.description: Get details for a specific sub-genre using its unique identifier.

tools.name: v2.getDiscoveryV2Suggest
tools.description: Find search suggestions and filter your suggestions by location, source, etc.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
